title: YouTube Poop: Link' s Face is Evil PART 1
description:
This in the beginning was supposed to be the "Random youtube poop - PART 3" but then I changed idea.... yes.... is too a bit random.... but anyway, all guys talking about the evil link's face.... soon the part 2....

Included songs:

White & Nerdy and Uncle Fucker!!!!

In the credits at end I forgot some things so here I report the "FULL" credits:

Clips used:

Link Faces of Evil Intro/End
Wand of Gamelon Intro/End
Dexter's Lab - The Muffins King episode
Mirror's Edge
Super Mario Bros

Songs used:

South Park - Uncle Fucka
Weird Al Yankovic - White & Nerdy

Sounds:

Some sounds from FindSounds.com
Some sounds from Duke Nukem 3D
Some sounds from Neighbours From Hell

Editing:

Sony Vegas Pro 8.0c

Enjoy.... part 2 is coming soon.... :D
